Get Started
Part of Mezzofy Exchange Protocol | View Ecosystem

COUPON MARKETING

SELLING VOUCHERS HAS NEVER BEEN EASIER

Turn coupon marketing expense into revenue stream with payment-integrated sales. Sell digital vouchers online with advance cashflow and multi-channel distribution powered by the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol.

Contact Us Now Learn More

Everything You Need to Sell Coupons Online

Complete platform solution from creation to payment, designed for merchants who want to maximize their digital voucher sales

Full Service

Mezzofy manages coupon creation with complete visibility and control. Focus on your business while we handle the technical complexities.

  • End-to-end coupon management
  • Complete visibility and control

Payment Connected

Seamlessly integrated payment processing with automatic payouts to your merchant account.

  • Multiple payment gateway integration
  • Automatic payouts to merchant accounts

Multiple Channels

Sell concurrently across your own channels and partner networks to maximize reach and revenue.

  • Proprietary channel support
  • Partner network distribution

Coupon Online Sales

Unlock the full potential of digital voucher sales with instant delivery and improved cash flow.

  • Instant delivery to customers
  • Advance cashflow for your business
  • Boost customer loyalty

Secure. Seamless. Adaptable

Our platform offers fraud-proof functionality with flexible payment integration options, designed to scale with your business

Authentic Coupons

Risk-free for customers with verified, authentic digital vouchers backed by secure validation technology.

Fully Integrated

Flexible payment gateway options that work with your existing infrastructure and preferred payment providers.

Expand Reach

Access marketplace channels and corporate staff benefit programs to reach new customer segments.

Sales Data Analytics

Comprehensive insights for campaign optimization with real-time reporting and performance metrics.

We Manage. You Earn

Three simple steps to start selling your digital vouchers online

1

Setup & Create

Merchants complete simple forms to set up their account and create voucher offerings. Quick onboarding with minimal complexity.

2

Sell Online

Multi-channel distribution begins with secure payment processing. Your vouchers go live across all selected channels simultaneously.

3

Get Paid & Review

Receive monthly payouts with full sales transparency. Review detailed analytics and optimize your offerings.

Simple Pricing

One transparent fee structure with everything you need to start selling

$99 /month

or $999/year (Save 17%)

One Fee Includes:

  • Account setup - Complete onboarding assistance
  • Coupon catalogue setup - Professional voucher configuration
  • Vouchers setup - Minimum $20 selling price
  • Payment gateway integration - Secure processing
  • Online support - Dedicated assistance
  • Low transaction fees - Competitive rates on sales

+ Coupon Management

Backend infrastructure for vouchers you're selling

+ Coupon Wallet
